publications.name: The New York Times
publications.quote: A transcendent experience — five stars without hesitation.

publications.name: Wine Spectator
publications.quote: Perhaps the finest cellar in the city.

reviews.name: Isabelle Fontaine
reviews.comment: Maison Dorée is simply peerless. The foie gras was ethereal, the service flawless, and the wine list a love letter to Burgundy. My husband and I felt as though we were the only guests in the room.

reviews.name: Jonathan Ashworth
reviews.comment: I have dined in three-Michelin-starred restaurants across Europe. Maison Dorée rivals them all. The Soufflé au Chocolat alone is worth the transatlantic flight.

reviews.name: Mei-Lin Chen
reviews.comment: The Chef's Table experience was the highlight of our New York visit. Chef Dubois is a genius — the langoustine tartare was the most beautiful thing I've ever eaten.

reviews.name: Alessandro Ricci
reviews.comment: As a food critic, I rarely use superlatives. But Maison Dorée compels me to: impeccable, gracious, and utterly unforgettable. The Homard Thermidor is a masterwork.

reviews.name: Sophie & James Hargreaves
reviews.comment: Our wedding anniversary dinner exceeded every expectation. Our reserved table in the garden alcove, the personalised menu card — every detail made us feel utterly cherished.

reviews.name: Dr. Priya Nair
reviews.comment: The Sunday champagne brunch is a New York institution. The sommelier remembered my preference from a previous visit six months prior. That is the mark of true hospitality.
